name: Corn Lightbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Blend in the buttermilk and oil until just combined.
3. Spoon the batter into a lightly greased 9-inch by 5-inch loaf pan.
4. Let stand for 10 minutes.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes.
6. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
